---
description: Assert quality readiness against constitution and gate criteria.
mode: agent
---

Invoke `@review` for quality assertion on the active feature.

## Steps

1. Verify constitution alignment and non-functional requirements.
2. Verify coverage of user stories, acceptance criteria, and tasks.
3. Check unresolved risks and open blockers.
4. Produce pass/fail rationale per quality dimension.

Output must include sections: Quality Matrix, Failing Conditions, Remediation Actions, Ship Recommendation.
